mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, total_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
